race.comment: POISEN POINT (10) stalked the pace and looked to have every chance but struggled a bit at the end of 1600m at Randwick last start. Far better placed dropping back to this trip. Nicely in after Neale's claim and just needs a few breaks from an awkward gate to be right in the finish. HELL OF A FOX (7) was crunched from $3.10 into $2.60 and got the job done impressively in open company over this distance at Canberra last time out. Has been in work for a long while but continues to perform. At her best over 1400m so another big run is likely. SHOTGUN BELLA (15) has been about the money in town since a first-up win over 1100m here. Has only missed the placings once in ten starts. Will race handy and give a great sight again. KRANICH (9) caught the eye in the dying stages over 1100m at Dubbo recently. Boasts a 100% top three strike-rate at 1400m. Wide gate the only concern. DANCES WITH HOOVES (3) returned in good order at Tamworth last start and has a far better second-up record.
